image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know your brain can strengthen connections just by repeating actions?
Context visual: This process is called Long-Term Potentiation, or LTP.
Escalation visual: When you repeatedly activate a synapse, it becomes more sensitive, enhancing the signal.
Evidence visual: Research shows LTP can last for hours, sometimes even longer.
Payoff visual: Think about it: every time you practice, you're literally rewiring your brain.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about your brain? Hit follow for more neuroscience insights!
